cells.rationale: Symlink confinement, atomic private publication, and integrity verification form subtle security invariants that warrant the hard opus gate.
This cross-cutting wire-contract rollout combines trusted-path security, ambiguous delivery cleanup, and mixed-version compatibility across sender and watcher surfaces.
Schema migration, replay identity, and row-first retention require preserving subtle lifecycle correctness invariants across multiple persistence surfaces.
The bounded documentation edit needs careful user-facing wording and semantic distinctions but no difficult implementation reasoning.
